entities.name: FERTILIZER USE
entities.description: The adoption and application of fertilizers by farmers on their farms

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the study on fertilizer adoption was conducted

entities.name: SEMI-ARID ZONE
entities.description: Drier geographical areas characterized by low rainfall and specific environmental constraints

entities.name: LIBERALIZED MARKETS
entities.description: Economic environments where market regulations are reduced to allow more private sector participation

entities.name: TOBIT REGRESSION MODEL
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze the factors influencing fertilizer adoption decisions

entities.name: EDUCATION OF HOUSEHOLD HEAD
entities.description: The level of formal education attained by the head of the farming household

entities.name: EXPERIENCE USING FERTILIZER
entities.description: The prior history and knowledge of a farmer regarding fertilizer application

entities.name: CASH CROP
entities.description: Crops grown specifically for sale to generate income

entities.name: FERTILIZER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The accessibility of fertilizer through rural retail outlets and availability in small packages

entities.name: LAND PRESSURE
entities.description: The high demand for land relative to the available supply

entities.name: FAMILY LABOUR SIZE
entities.description: The number of family members available to provide labor on the farm
